arts.ttl: Zaniolo waiting for Fiorentina transfer from Galatasaray via Atalanta
arts.sum: Nicolò Zaniolo is set to join Fiorentina after Atalanta agreed to terminate the loan early...

arts.ttl: Scamacca’s Return Imminent: Atalanta Striker Overcomes Long-Term Injury
arts.sum: Gianluca Scamacca's long-awaited return to action for Atalanta is on the horizon, bringing a ray of hope to Gian Piero Gasperini's injury-plagued squad. The Italian striker has finally overcome the anterior cruciate ligament rupture that has kept him sidelined since the summer. The post Scamacca’s Return Imminent: Atalanta Striker Overcomes Long-Term Injury appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Agent Riso: “Frattesi Stays at Inter, Maldini Deal with Atalanta Not Closed”
arts.sum: Sports agent Beppe Riso provided updates on several of his clients after leaving Inter Milan's headquarters on Thursday. Riso was at the club to finalize contract extensions for two young Inter talents, De Pieri and Lavelli, who will both extend their contracts for another five years. The post Agent Riso: “Frattesi Stays at Inter, Maldini Deal with Atalanta Not Closed” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina Secure Zaniolo Deal, In Talks With Juventus for Fagioli
arts.sum: Fiorentina have reached an agreement with Atalanta for the transfer of Nicolò Zaniolo. Atalanta will return the player to Galatasaray, effectively ending his loan spell. The Florence-based club is now finalizing the last details with Galatasaray and Zaniolo's agent, bringing the 25-year-old Italian closer to his move to Florence. The post Fiorentina Secure Zaniolo Deal, In Talks With Juventus for Fagioli appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star speaks out on his future after Atalanta draw
arts.sum: Barcelona star Ronald Araújo has this week provided a fresh insight into his future with the club. This, of course, comes fresh off the Uruguayan international putting pen to paper…
